overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-slicked neon-lit downtown street, ascending exterior stairs, and entering a corporate building lobby. The scene transitions from vibrant outdoor neon to subdued indoor lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown sidewalk with commercial storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk between tall buildings, passing neon-lit storefronts and advertisements

entered.detail: smooth concrete facade of a high-rise building running along the left side of the sidewalk
brightly lit commercial signs and holographic advertisements in pink, green, and blue neon
tall poles with horizontal fluorescent lights illuminating the wet pavement
elevated walkway connecting buildings across the street ahead
yellow and concrete barriers separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow downtown sidewalk at night, flanked by a tall concrete building wall on the left and vibrant neon-lit storefronts on the right. The wet pavement reflects the colorful neon lights and streetlamps. The street is mostly empty with sparse distant traffic visible beneath the overhead pedestrian bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance staircase with overhead cover

events.description: begins ascending the wide concrete stairs toward the building entrance

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete stairs leading up to the building entrance, moving away from the street level

entered.detail: wide stone staircase with yellow safety line leading up to the building entrance
recessed lighting fixtures framing the glass entrance doors at the top of the stairs
rectangular concrete planters with green shrubs along the stair railing

segments.scene_description: Ascending a wide concrete staircase toward a building entrance, transitioning from the open street to a sheltered approach. The neon storefronts and streetlamps fall behind as warm artificial lighting illuminates the entrance ahead. Planter boxes with greenery line the left side of the stairs.

events.description: enters the building lobby from the outdoor staircase, passing through glass doors
lighting shifts from vibrant neon streetlights to warm recessed indoor lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the glass entrance doors and proceeding across the polished lobby floor toward the elevators

entered.detail: twin elevator doors with metallic frames and dark panels at the far end of the lobby
grid of square warm-white recessed light fixtures set into the dark marble walls
grid of square warm-white recessed light fixtures set into the dark marble walls
polished dark stone tile flooring with subtle pattern reflecting the overhead lights

segments.scene_description: Inside a sleek, quiet corporate lobby with polished marble floors and dark marble walls. Warm recessed lighting replaces the neon glow of the street outside. The camera moves steadily toward a set of elevator doors at the far end of the hall, the space entirely empty of other people.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, rain-slicked neon street into the subdued stillness of a corporate interior. It begins by gliding along a narrow downtown sidewalk, where the wet pavement reflects the colorful glow of storefronts and streetlamps beneath an overhead pedestrian bridge. As the camera moves forward, it ascends a wide concrete staircase lined with greenery, leaving the neon lights behind in favor of the warm artificial lighting of a sheltered entrance. The scene then shifts seamlessly into a sleek corporate lobby, where the outdoor chaos is replaced by polished marble floors and dark walls. Finally, the camera moves steadily through the quiet, empty hall toward a set of elevator doors under soft recessed lighting.
